profiles.description: Trimmed LLVM pipeline for interactive GUI iteration and CI parity benches.
profiles.when_to_use: Large binaries during exploration; GUI Fast Decompile; scripts/parity_ctest.ps1 -Fast. Pair with --backend-no-opts and --disable-static-code-detection for best speed.

profiles.description: Default RetDec native decompilation pipeline (matches decompiler-config.json llvmPasses).
profiles.when_to_use: General-purpose decompilation when you want the stock RetDec behavior without GUI-specific shortcuts.

profiles.description: Full LLVM pass list with backend readability optimizers enabled (default backend settings).
profiles.when_to_use: Release-quality output, diffing against reference decompilers, or batch jobs where runtime is acceptable.
